title: Welcome to the Portal — Quorum Tutorials #1
description: A friendly first look at Quorum, your board's private portal — the one place where your foundation's launch checklist, documents, votes, meetings, and notes all live. After this video you can name all seven sections of the portal. Next: Signing In & Getting the App.

title: Signing In & Getting the App — Quorum Tutorials #2
description: Sign in to your organization's portal and install Quorum as an app on your phone or computer — no app store needed. Covers username, password, Keep me signed in, and Add to Home Screen. Next: A Tour of Your Dashboard.

title: A Tour of Your Dashboard — Quorum Tutorials #3
description: Read your Dashboard like mission control: the launch progress ring, the four status cards, the checklist preview, recent documents with signature badges, upcoming meetings with one-click Join, plus search and quick notes. Next: How the Launch Checklist Works.

title: How the Launch Checklist Works — Quorum Tutorials #4
description: Your roadmap to a compliant 501(c)(3): 27 steps in 5 stages, each in plain English, with linked documents and one-click check-offs that update your progress everywhere. Next: Stage 1 — Form the Corporation & Get Your Tax ID.

title: Stage 1: Form the Corporation & Get Your Tax ID — Quorum Tutorials #5
description: Two mighty steps: file the Articles of Incorporation with the California Secretary of State, then get the foundation's free EIN at IRS.gov — in that order. Next: Stage 2 — The Organizational Board Meeting.

title: Stage 2: The Organizational Board Meeting — Quorum Tutorials #6
description: Fifteen steps, one afternoon: hold the first board meeting, adopt the Bylaws, elect officers, adopt the protection policies, approve the festival, and sign the Organizational Board Minutes. Next: Stage 3 — Banking, Signatories & Insurance.

title: Stage 3: Banking, Signatories & Insurance — Quorum Tutorials #7
description: Open the corporate bank account (bring the Articles, EIN letter, and signed Board Resolution), set the two-signature spending rule, and get D&O plus liability insurance. Next: Stage 4 — Tax Exemption & Charitable Registration.

title: Stage 4: Tax Exemption & Charitable Registration — Quorum Tutorials #8
description: The five filings that make it official: Form SI-100, IRS Form 1023 for 501(c)(3) status, the CA Attorney General's CT-1, FTB Form 3500A, and the yearly RRF-1 + Form 990 renewals — with every deadline explained. Next: Stage 5 — Ready to Raise Money.

title: Stage 5: Ready to Raise Money — Quorum Tutorials #9
description: The fun stage: set your sponsorship tier prices in the Prospectus and finish the four donor thank-you letter templates so you're ready the moment someone gives. Next: Understanding Your Documents.

title: Understanding Your Documents — Quorum Tutorials #10
description: Tour the document library: the four category tabs, plain-English descriptions, the status badges (Draft, Awaiting signatures, Fully signed), and search that narrows as you type. Next: Signing with DocuSeal.

title: Signing with DocuSeal — Quorum Tutorials #11
description: Sign the Bylaws without a printer: open the signing room, find Sign now next to your name, and click — recorded, dated, counted. Plus Remind and Email board to sign for the stragglers. Next: Tracking Signature Status.

title: Tracking Signature Status — Quorum Tutorials #12
description: Who's signed and who hasn't — answered on the Dashboard card, the library's status column, and the per-signer progress inside each document, with gentle one-person reminders. Next: Creating a Motion.

title: Creating a Motion — Quorum Tutorials #13
description: Put a decision to the board: click New motion, write a plain-English title and description, and one click schedules the Zoom vote meeting, calendars it, and emails every voting director. Next: How Directors Vote.

title: How Directors Vote — Quorum Tutorials #14
description: Every director's view of a vote: open the motion card, find your name, click For, Against, or Abstain — one click and you're on the record, with a Zoom call when you want to talk first. Next: Reading Vote Results.

title: Reading Vote Results — Quorum Tutorials #15
description: Read results like a board secretary: the color tally bar, simple-majority math (4 of 7), the green Passed badge, and how open motions look while votes are still coming in. Next: Using the Calendar.

title: Using the Calendar — Quorum Tutorials #16
description: Every board date in one place: the month grid, the This-month rail, Google Calendar sync to your phone, and one-click Join Zoom on any meeting. Next: Connecting Google Calendar & Zoom.

title: Connecting Google Calendar & Zoom — Quorum Tutorials #17
description: The one-minute, one-time setup: connect Google Calendar so board events sync both ways, then connect Zoom so meetings and motions schedule their own video calls. Next: Taking Notes.

title: Taking Notes — Quorum Tutorials #18
description: Your private notebook inside the portal: New note, type, and it saves as you go — no save button to forget. Reopen anything from the list, delete what you don't need. Next: Board Member Quick Start.

title: Board Member Quick Start — Quorum Tutorials #19
description: The two-minute tour for directors: sign documents with Sign now, vote For/Against/Abstain on motions, and show up with the Calendar's Join buttons. Sign, vote, show up — that's the job. Next: Managing Team & Access.

title: Managing Team & Access (for IT) — Quorum Tutorials #20
description: The admin room: each member's login and permissions, the access card with username, personal email and a generated temp password, the Vote/Sign permission tiles, instant Revoke access, and connecting the foundation's email.
